mapper.select: SELECT * FROM auth_qr_login_session WHERE qr_token = #{qrToken} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_qr_login_session SET status = #{status}, updated_time = now() WHERE qr_token = #{qrToken}
UPDATE auth_qr_login_session SET status = 'SCANNED', scanned_time = COALESCE(scanned_time, #{scannedTime}), updated_time = now() WHERE qr_token = #{qrToken}
UPDATE auth_qr_login_session SET status = #{status}, user_id = #{userId}, confirmed_time = #{confirmedTime}, updated_time = now() WHERE qr_token = #{qrToken}
UPDATE auth_qr_login_session SET status = 'CONSUMED', consumed_time = #{consumedTime}, updated_time = now() WHERE qr_token = #{qrToken} AND status = 'CONFIRMED' AND consumed_time IS NULL
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM auth_qr_login_session WHERE expire_time < now()
